scripts.setup: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup
scripts.setup:host: npm run db:reset && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.docker:benchmark:compile: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:compile:container
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose run --rm runner npm run setup:container
scripts.docker:benchmark: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:eager: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:eager:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:tx: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:tx:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:tx:compare: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:tx:compare:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:quick: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:quick:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:postgres: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:postgres:container
scripts.docker:benchmark:mysql: npm run docker:build && npm run db:up && npm run docker:setup && docker compose run --rm runner npm run benchmark:mysql:container
